post.description:
Create a new comment event for a case.

Requires the following permissions:
- `case:Comment`

parameters.name: case_id
parameters.description: ID of the case to add the event to. Accepts either the case UUID (the `id` field on a case) or the readable identifier (the `readable_id` field, e.g. `CASE-123`).

schema.description: ID of the case to add the event to. Accepts either the case UUID (the `id` field on a case) or the readable identifier (the `readable_id` field, e.g. `CASE-123`).

schema.title: Create comment event request
schema.description: Request for creating a comment on a case.

get.description:
Retrieve all events associated with a specific case.

Requires the following permissions:
- `case:Read`

parameters.name: case_id
parameters.description: ID of the case. Accepts either the case UUID (the `id` field on a case) or the readable identifier (the `readable_id` field, e.g. `CASE-123`).

schema.description: ID of the case. Accepts either the case UUID (the `id` field on a case) or the readable identifier (the `readable_id` field, e.g. `CASE-123`).

post.description:
Synchronize events from an external source (e.g. Slack) into the case.

Requires the following permissions:
- `case:Comment`

parameters.name: case_id
parameters.description: ID of the case to sync external case events for. Accepts either the case UUID (the `id` field on a case) or the readable identifier (the `readable_id` field, e.g. `CASE-123`).

schema.description: ID of the case to sync external case events for. Accepts either the case UUID (the `id` field on a case) or the readable identifier (the `readable_id` field, e.g. `CASE-123`).

get.description:
Retrieve a single event by its unique identifier.

Requires the following permissions:
- `case:Read`

parameters.name: event_id
parameters.description: ID of the event to fetch

schema.description: ID of the event to fetch

put.description:
Modify the content of an existing comment event.

Requires the following permissions:
- `case:Comment`

parameters.name: event_id
parameters.description: ID of the comment event to update

schema.description: ID of the comment event to update

schema.title: Update comment event request
schema.description: Request for updating a comment on a case event.

delete.description:
Delete an existing comment event from a case.

Requires the following permissions:
- `case:Comment`

parameters.name: event_id
parameters.description: ID of the comment event to delete

schema.description: ID of the comment event to delete

ApiKeyActor.title: API key actor
ApiKeyActor.description: Information about the API key that initiated the action.

CaseEvent.title: Case event
CaseEvent.description: Represents an immutable entry in a case's event timeline.

eventTime.description: Logical occurrence time of the event

updateTime.description: If edited, last modification time of the event

CaseEventDataAssigned.description: One-of wrapper for concrete case event types.

CaseEventDataNotificationFailed.description: One-of wrapper for concrete case event types.

CaseEventDataNotificationSent.description: One-of wrapper for concrete case event types.

CaseEventDataPriorityDetailsChanged.title: Case event data
CaseEventDataPriorityDetailsChanged.description: One-of wrapper for concrete case event types.

CaseEventDataUnassigned.title: Case event data
CaseEventDataUnassigned.description: One-of wrapper for concrete case event types.

ChangeAssigneeFailedEvent.title: Change assignee failed event
ChangeAssigneeFailedEvent.description: Event recorded when an attempt to reassign a case fails.

CommentCaseEvent.title: Comment event
CommentCaseEvent.description: Event recorded when a user posts a comment on a case.

CreateCommentResponse.title: Create comment event response
CreateCommentResponse.description: Response returned after successfully creating a comment.

CustomDashboardWidgetAttachment.title: Custom dashboard widget attachment
CustomDashboardWidgetAttachment.description: Attachment containing custom dashboard widget data and screenshot

customDashboardId.description: Unique identifier of the custom dashboard

queryLinkSuffix.description: URL suffix for accessing the widget (not including the Coralogix domain part)

widgetId.description: Unique identifier of the widget within the dashboard

DeleteCommentResponse.title: Delete comment response
DeleteCommentResponse.description: Empty response; success indicated by HTTP status

FileAttachment.title: File attachment
FileAttachment.description: Attachment representing a file with metadata

fileId.description: Unique identifier of the file (same id as used in blobset flow)

fileName.description: Original name of the attached file

isDeleted.description: Flag indicating whether the file has been marked as deleted

FilterPathAndValuesFilters.title: FilterPathAndValues
FilterPathAndValuesFilters.description: This data structure represents a filter path and values

FilterPathAndValuesMultipleValues.title: FilterPathAndValues
FilterPathAndValuesMultipleValues.description: This data structure represents a filter path and values

Filters.title: Filters
Filters.description: This data structure represents a filter

threshold.description: Duration after which the KPI threshold was set to breach

LogAttachment.title: Log attachment
LogAttachment.description: Attachment containing log data and related information

logContent.example: ERROR: Database connection timeout after 30 seconds
logContent.description: Raw content of the log entry

logId.description: Unique identifier of the log entry

logTimestamp.description: Timestamp when the log entry was created

queryLinkSuffix.description: URL suffix for querying related logs (not including the Coralogix domain part)

error.description: Error message for the failed notification

notificationRequestId.description: The notification request ID, as sent to the notifications center.

notifications.description: List of notifications produced by this action

PagerDutyActor.title: PagerDuty actor
PagerDutyActor.description: Information about the PagerDuty user who initiated the action.

coralogixUserId.description: If the PagerDuty user is linked to a Coralogix user, this field contains the Coralogix user ID.

PriorityDetails.title: Priority details
PriorityDetails.description: Priority details, including system computed and user override values.

PrometheusAlertManagerActor.title: Prometheus Alert Manager actor
PrometheusAlertManagerActor.description: Information about the Prometheus Alert Manager instance that initiated the action.

ServiceNowActor.title: Service Now actor
ServiceNowActor.description: Information about the user who initiated the action in Service Now platform

coralogixUserId.description: If the Service Now user is linked to a Coralogix user, this field contains the Coralogix user ID.

SlackActor.title: Slack actor
SlackActor.description: Information about the Slack user who initiated the action.

coralogixUserId.description: If the Slack user is linked to a Coralogix user, this field contains the Coralogix user ID.

SyncExternalCaseEventsResponse.title: Sync external Case events response
SyncExternalCaseEventsResponse.description: Response returned after syncing external case events.

syncRegistered.description: Indicates whether the sync was successfully registered

unknownAssigneeEmail.description: Email of the assignee that could not be found

UpdateCommentResponse.title: Update comment event response
UpdateCommentResponse.description: Response returned after successfully updating a comment.

UserActor.title: User actor
UserActor.description: Information about the user who initiated the action.

v1.GetEventResponse.title: Get event response
v1.GetEventResponse.description: Response containing the details of a case event.

v1.ListEventsResponse.title: List events response
v1.ListEventsResponse.description: Response containing a list of case events.
